vertical_datum: MLLW (converted from NAVD88, -0.058m offset from NOAA station 9410230 La Jolla -- see script docstring)
source_dataset: NOAA NCEI - San Diego, California Coastal Digital Elevation Model (NAVD88), 2012 -- subset to Mission Bay
source_citation: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information, 2012. San Diego, California Coastal Digital Elevation Model (NAVD88).
notes: wet_mask/land_mask/nodata_mask are mutually exclusive and collectively exhaustive.
depth_m is defined (finite) only where wet_mask is True.

Unlike San Diego Bay's P020 build, this source DEM has real land elevation data (not just nodata past the coastline), so land_mask is a real elevation>=0 classification, and the open-ocean boundary is derived from which crop edge the retained connected component actually touches, not a hand-traced line -- see build_grid_mission_bay.py.

Vertical datum converted from source NAVD88 to MLLW via a fixed 0.058m offset (La Jolla station 9410230's published NAVD88/MLLW relationship), not a spatially-varying VDatum conversion -- adequate for a small embayment but a known approximation.
Resampled with block-average (rasterio Resampling.average), not stride sampling.
